entry.title: ai-sdlc
entry.content: AI-driven software delivery lifecycle for Claude Code. Two pipelines: (1) a clean, dependency-aware core pipeline — discuss → req2prd → prd2plan → (plan2jira | plan2linear) → execute-plan; and (2) an end-to-end test-driven pipeline (a "dark factory") that authors tests before code against a real mock app or Figma design, then builds to green — runnable fully lights-out via tdd-unattended.sh. Backed by 23 expert builder agents, 19 critic agents with a domain-matched affinity matrix, a mandatory Devil's Advocate adversarial gate, and shell-orchestrated execution with ralph-loop quality gates.

entry.title: larch
entry.content: Multi-agent workflow automation for Claude Code: issue-anchored `/design` (one direct-drafting flow; plan-review panel), `/bug` (consumer issue-filing helper), `/deps` issue dependency audits, and `/implement` (positional `<issue-N>`, fixed 7200s Step 2 timeout, optional `--merge`, `--forked`, `--draft`, `--no-admin-fallback`, `--no-logs-commit`, `--coder`, `--run-id`). `/implement` Preflight reads the `larch:plan` block from the issue body; `/implement` Step 5 code review always uses the unified strict panel internally (public `--panel` argv removed).

entry.title: devbyalex
entry.content: An autonomous, stage-gated app-building workflow: plan (spec → implementation guide → wireframes), dev (scaffold → auth → per-feature build/validate loop + a cosmetic tweak lane), launch readiness (incl. observability wiring), and live (post-launch feedback triaged back into the loop). Ships init-ai to bootstrap or integrate the workflow into any repo, plus the orchestrator skills and specialist agents that drive each stage. Designed to run unattended via scheduled actions until an app is launch-ready, and to keep it improving after.

entry.title: tw-stock-etf-advisor
entry.content: Taiwan ETF / stock research, buy-sell decisions, personal holdings tracking, and K-line charting. Finds common holdings between ETFs (e.g. 0050 / 0052), recommends what to buy and why with an entry/exit plan from a live quote, records the trades you make, reviews your holdings to suggest what to sell, and draws a standalone Tokyo-Night candlestick chart that marks why each buy/sell/hold happened — with forward ⚑ signal lines for watchlist triggers and a post-mortem review panel logging every decision (status, condition, outcome). Persists price history + decision markers in a local SQLite DB. Trade discipline built in: per-position thesis notes with falsifiable assumptions, red lines and a health score re-scored on every review; a 5-sentence mirror-test entry gate; move attribution (價值事件/情緒/原因不明) on big swings; A/B/C data-richness rating with an honest 資料不足 verdict; and cross-source deviation checks against primary sources. Always fetches live data via agent-browser; never guesses or derives prices.

entry.title: dotlight-skillset

Combines a customized fork of obra/superpowers v6 (workflow), a trimmed fork of Aaronontheweb/dotnet-skills (patterns + agents), and adapted skills from mattpocock/skills, hsmejky/skills, and DietrichGebert/ponytail. Tuned for .NET 10 + Aspire + Minimal API + NHibernate or EF Core + Postgres/TimescaleDB projects with Vue or Blazor frontends. Key overrides: AskUserQuestion-first brainstorming, domain-first AND persistence-first planning before TDD, lazy-senior-dev minimalism (reviewability as a constraint), database-design-conventions + database-review quality gate, and executing-plans preferred over subagent-driven-development.

entry.title: pipeline-orchestrator
entry.content: v8.22.0 (2026-07-07, MINOR — hook-unblock pack: 5 anti-deadlock/anti-friction fixes to the enforcement layer, from the 2026-07-07 corrective-telemetry diagnosis (27 triggers; live egg-and-chicken deadlock killed run 2026-07-04-e2e-ruler-recalibration-s2 with 0/320 diff): (T1) ALREADY-DISPATCHED exemption — pendingAlreadyDispatched + dispatchTargetMatches in edit-guard-hook.cjs treat a DISPATCH_REQUEST as satisfied once the target subagent was genuinely spawned (pending_dispatches record from dispatch-record-hook, created_at >= emitted_at, leaf-containment match mirroring isResolutionAgent) — frees all 3 session blockers at once; block between REQUEST and spawn, tamper fail-closed and malformed-shape guard preserved. (T2) ANCHORED exec-window control-plane exemption in dispatch-pending-gate.cjs — a Bash/PowerShell command that IS exactly node …/scripts/exec-window/open.cjs|close.cjs (env-var prefixes tolerated) passes with a live pending; composition (&&, ;, |, backtick, newline, subshell) or the path embedded as another program argument never does (anti-injection pinned by tests). (T3) DETERMINISTIC pending clear — step-ledger-stamp.cjs (PostToolUse:Agent) clearSatisfiedPending removes the returning agent-matching DISPATCH_REQUEST entry from the signed state (withLock + read-verify-refuse-launder, record-step posture), replacing the honor-only controller prose whose omission caused a false 482-min PROTOCOL_HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT. (T4) DISK-TRUTH anti-false-timeout — pendingResolvedByEvents: a pending whose matching DISPATCH_RESULT is already recorded in the run protocol-events.jsonl (timestamp >= request) is RESOLVED, wired into findLivePendingBlock AND the cleanup-orphan checkHandshakeTimeouts sweep (implementing its own docstring promise "AND no matching response arrived"); DISPATCH-only scope (GATE/PLAN_MODE stay human-resolved). (T5) STAMP-BY-EVIDENCE — step-ledger-gate.cjs grants the tdd step when gate-decisions.jsonl carries TDD_APPROVAL APPROVED|CONFIRMED (frozen RED tests from a prior session), persists the stamp via recordStep and leaves a STEP_STAMP_BY_EVIDENCE audit event in protocol-events (NOT a new gate — Iron Law preserved: Mandatory Gates table + Gate Registry UNTOUCHED). Tests tests/regression/v8.22.0/F1-F5 (41 scenarios, TDD RED->GREEN per task); suite 258/8 = pre-existing baseline exactly (3x Langfuse + score-writer + F4 v8.8.0 + 3x v8.21.0 frozen RED from the in-flight S2 slice), 0 new failures. Authored via the loopify harness (loop/hook-unblock branch, per-task selective commits); headless loop hit the harness sensitive-file wall on .claude/hooks/** — implementation landed from the interactive session, lesson recorded in loops/hook-unblock/LOOP_DONE.md. Anterior: v8.20.0 (2026-07-02, MINOR — enforcement unblocking pack from the 2026-07-02 hook audit): (1) STOP-TRAP FAIL-OPEN: the three Stop-family gates (stop-gate-hook, e2e-eval-gate, subagent-stop-commit-hook) blocked FOREVER when their continuity counter could not be persisted (signer unavailable / verifyState failing at write time / read-only state or dir) — persist()/withSignedState() now report real commit success and each block site fails OPEN with an audit trace, extending the existing !statePath B5 guard to every unpersistable shape. (2) scope-lock-hook emits the canonical hookSpecificOutput PreToolUse envelope — the old FLAT top-level shape was not honored by the harness, so the refactor scope deny was either ignored or bound without its reason ever reaching the model. (3) PIPELINE_NOT_ARMED / CORRUPT_STATE denies + the arm-writer/session-arm banners rewritten to ONE reachable next action (dispatch Agent(subagent_type: pipeline-orchestrator:core:pipeline-controller)) — the impossible write-sentinel-state-by-hand recipe (which contradicted MARKER_TAMPERED and deepened the block) and the literal {PIPELINE_DOC_PATH}/<cwd> placeholders are GONE. (4) lib/pipeline-arm.cjs HARNESS_OPEN_TAG now also cuts teammate-message/agent-message envelopes — a background subagent report QUOTING /pipeline-orchestrator:pipeline continue in prose armed a phantom CONTINUE run live on 2026-07-02, bricking the session Bash/PowerShell/Agent until the TTL. (5) NEW .claude/hooks/sentinel-state-autosign.cjs (PostToolUse Write|Edit|MultiEdit|NotebookEdit): signs the Bash-less controller freshly-written UNSIGNED run-dir sentinel-state.json (NEVER touches a present signature — invalid = tamper evidence; SKIPS under PIPELINE_HMAC_STRICT; fail-open) — closes STATE_FILE_INIT_FAIL and most corrective-loop noise; zero security delta (unsigned was already tolerated by default). TDD tests/regression/v8.20.0/F1-F5 (26 scenarios RED-to-GREEN incl. a live-repro of the phantom arm). Iron Law: only .claude/hooks/ + lib/ + hooks/hooks.json + tests/; Mandatory Gates table + Gate Registry UNTOUCHED; no .codex mirror. Suite 257/5 (same 5 pre-existing). Lockstep all version surfaces. v8.19.3 (2026-07-01, PATCH — arm-classifier: keyword-inferred read-only runs no longer arm [recurring phantom-arm deadlock fix]): a natural-language review/audit/analysis request ('faça revisão adversarial', 'faça uma auditoria', 'análise') was classified FULL/Audit and armed the pipeline-arm-pending marker — but read-only work never opens an exec window, so it hit INLINE_WORK_BLOCKED, aborted, and left an orphan marker that bricked the next task with PIPELINE_NOT_ARMED (observed live in interview-coach 2026-06-30 and 07-01). FIX: lib/pipeline-arm.cjs::writeArmPending now also skips arming for the read-only TYPES (Audit, UX Simulation) when they were INFERRED FROM KEYWORDS (source kw:), while an EXPLICIT --audit/--ux flag stays a deliberate governed run and still arms (preserving the STEP_1_7 direct-entry evidence, v8.16.0). Safe direction per the documented arm trade-off: a missed arm is recoverable (re-invoke); a phantom arm deadlocks. TDD tests/regression/v8.19.3/F1-readonly-types-no-arm (RED 4-fail → GREEN); 2 deliberate v8.7.0 pins updated to the --audit-flag path. Iron Law: only lib/pipeline-arm.cjs + tests/ touched; Gates/Registry UNTOUCHED; no .codex mirror. Suite 252/5 (5 pre-existing Langfuse/env/F4). Lockstep across all version surfaces. v8.19.2 (2026-07-01, PATCH — edit-guard-hook robustness [Cursor-crash hardening, Claude-Code-scoped]): the PreToolUse edit-guard no longer crashes into the opaque external catch ('edit-guard-hook internal error — failing closed') when .pipeline/sessions is present-but-unreadable (a file where a dir is expected → ENOTDIR/EACCES) — getActiveLock + getActiveExecWindow now guard readdirSync and return null instead of throwing, and the CLI external catch surfaces the REAL sanitized error (single-line, printable-ASCII, capped 200) instead of the opaque message, so a genuine failure stays fail-closed but debuggable. Posture UNCHANGED (still deny when the guard cannot evaluate); NO foreign tool-name vocabulary added — cross-runtime tool mapping is the other editor's concern, deliberately out of scope. TDD tests/regression/v8.19.2/F1 (RED 7-fail → GREEN, 8 checks). Iron Law: only .claude/hooks/edit-guard-hook.cjs + tests/ touched; Mandatory Gates table + Gate Registry UNTOUCHED; no .codex mirror. Suite 251/5 (5 pre-existing Langfuse/env/F4). Lockstep 9 surfaces. v8.19.1 (2026-06-30, PATCH — arm-marker consume-on-close deadlock fix): the pipeline-arm-pending marker (written at /pipeline invocation, 30-min TTL) was never consumed when a governed run ended deliberately, so a finished code-mutating run's still-live marker kept blocking the NEXT non-pipeline task in the same session with PIPELINE_NOT_ARMED until TTL/restart (REVIEW-ONLY/DIAGNOSTIC never arm — the trigger is a FULL/code run that armed, completed, and was never disarmed). FIX: stop-gate-hook.cjs consumes the marker on its closed-run ALLOW paths (completed/GO-completer/spec-seal/hard_failed-cap/deliberate-inactive) via a new session-aware lib/pipeline-arm.cjs::clearArmPendingForSession — never on a block, on SessionEnd/StopFailure recovery, or on corrupt state. Positive-ownership delete (deletes only when marker+caller session_ids are both present and equal, OR both absent; ambiguous/mismatched preserved for TTL) + tamper verdict delegated to the lib/arm-pending SSOT (a signed-but-invalid marker stays fail-closed). 2 zero-context adversarial rounds (1 HIGH tamper-bypass + 1 CRITICAL cross-session-delete, both fixed) then a final pass CLEAN. TDD tests/regression/v8.19.1/F1 (10 scenarios, all 5 call sites + tamper + ownership). Iron Law: only .claude/hooks/stop-gate-hook.cjs + lib/pipeline-arm.cjs + tests/ touched; Mandatory Gates table + Gate Registry UNTOUCHED; no .codex mirror. Suite 250/5 (5 pre-existing). Lockstep 9 surfaces. v8.17.0 (2026-06-28, MINOR — autonomous bugfix run delivers 4 audit-driven fixes + 1 meta-escape) — (AUDIT-001 MED-LOW) `.claude/hooks/stop-hook.cjs` adds tail-read verify after `appendRunLog`: on mismatch, a single `run-log verify mismatch` warn fires on stderr; soft-fail on missing/malformed; exported as `verifyRunLogAppend` for unit testing. (AUDIT-004 CRIT, deployment) new `lib/enforcement-status.cjs::detectEnforcementStatus({hooksDir, expectedCanonicalHook})` probes the install for the canonical execution-gate hook (`pipeline-arm-gate.cjs`); wired into the existing SessionStart `enforcement-surface-verify-hook.cjs` to emit a dedicated `ENFORCEMENT_INACTIVE` protocol-event with HIGH severity when missing — registered in `lib/contracts/e2e-eval.cjs::HYGIENE_EVENT_SEVERITY` at weight 1.0 so an install with the gate missing cannot reach clean ProcessHygiene. (AUDIT-006 NEW MED) `lib/e2e-evaluator.cjs::scoreRun` short-circuits on aborted runs (`state.abort_reason` non-empty + `pipeline_outcome` starting with `ABORTED_`): drops StepCompletion / GateCoverage / OrderIntegrity (renormalized over ProcessHygiene), emits exactly one AUDIT-class `hygiene_violation` named `PIPELINE_ABORTED` severity=high weight=1.0 — so aborted runs surface as aborts instead of being scored as catastrophic failures. (META — user-authorized chain-tied deadlock escape) `.claude/hooks/skill-frontmatter-parser.cjs::getEnforcementMode` honours the `PIPELINE_AUTONOMOUS_RECOVERY_MODE=true` env flag by DOWNGRADING `deny` to `warn` for the process (never escalates `warn`; case-sensitive `"true"` only; one stderr audit line per process). The flag institutionalizes the user-authorized self-recovery path: when a parent must dispatch multiple agents in sequence under autonomous /goal full autonomy, the chain-tied enforcement converts to WARN so the run can complete instead of deadlocking at the gate. Backward compat 100%. v7.5.0 (2026-05-22, MINOR — concurrent-safe tracing): isolates concurrent pipeline runs sharing a working directory so trace/span carriers, manifest allocation, and sentinel state discovery no longer collide on PPID or mtime heuristics. lib/run-directory.cjs::allocate switches the primary mkdir from {recursive:true} to {recursive:false} and retries on EEXIST with a fresh collision-resistant uniqueId (Date.now base36 + crypto.randomBytes(6).hex). The resulting runId — `${ordinal}-${uniqueId}-${slug}` — is published on process.env.PIPELINE_RUN_ID so descendant processes (langfuse-hook, sentinel-hook, stop-hook) key per-run state off the env-var instead of process.ppid or sentinel-state.json mtime. All three hooks fall back gracefully when PIPELINE_RUN_ID is absent, emitting one-shot AUDIT events (CARRIER_PPID_FALLBACK / DISCOVERY_RUN_ID_NO_MATCH / DISCOVERY_MTIME_FALLBACK) on stderr so the degradation is observable. New PIPELINE_TRACING_SCOPE env-var (`agent-only` default = v7.4.0 parity / `agent-plus-skill` / `full`) replaces the silent `tool !== 'Agent'` filter at langfuse-hook entry-point; unknown values fall through to safe-default with AUDIT TRACING_SCOPE_UNKNOWN. Codex mirror kept byte-identical per Iron Law. 5 new regression tests in tests/regression/v7.5.0/ (F1-F5, 44 sub-assertions, 100% GREEN). Existing unit tests in tests/unit/run-directory.test.js updated to the new runId format (external_consumers=none per spec.json). Backward-compat preserved: legacy single-arg PPID callers get the fallback path + AUDIT breadcrumb. v7.4.2 (2026-05-22, PATCH — Langfuse SDK vendored: bundles langfuse@3.38.4 + langfuse-core@3.38.20 + mustache@4.2.0 into the package so the cache works without a global install; closes Cannot find module 'langfuse' in marketplace cache). Automated multi-agent pipeline. v7.2.0 (2026-05-21) — MINOR. Phase 0 hardening: (1) STATE_FILE_INIT_FAIL gate (CIRCUIT_BREAKER) — hard precondition on the initial sentinel-state.json write, with happy-path PASS entry to preserve fidelity score; (2) PROTOCOL_HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT gate (HARD) — two-layer detection (primary out-of-band hook + secondary controller re-entry check) for stale GATE_REQUEST/DISPATCH_REQUEST/PLAN_MODE_REQUEST blocks; default 30min, env override PIPELINE_HANDSHAKE_TIMEOUT_MS with 60000ms floor; closes Achado #7 silent-deadlock pattern; (3) cleanup-orphan-sentinel-state-hook (.claude/hooks/, SessionStart) — auto-archives sentinel-state.json files older than 24h via atomic rename to sentinel-state.archived-<ts>.json (closes Achado B1-001); sandbox-checked cwd, depth-limited walk, symlink-skip; (4) --strict-spec flag — rejects Signal 3 (prose regex) and Signal 4 (glob fallback) Spec detection in unattended/CI mode where AskUserQuestion is unavailable; preserves Signal 1 (explicit path) and Signal 2 (--type=spec); precedence over conflicting FORCE_VARIANT=spec-*; STRICT_SPEC_REJECTION gate (AUDIT) logged. Gate Registry 32 → 35 rows (Core 16→18 + Routing 3→4). Mandatory Gates 22 → 23 (+STATE_FILE_INIT_FAIL). 4 batches with ATDD/BDD per scenario, TDD red→green per file, adversarial review per batch (22 findings addressed: 3 CRITICAL fixed, 12 HIGH fixed). Suite 45/46 green (F7 version-sync updated). v7.1.1 (2026-05-21) — PATCH (docs only). Enriches docs/diagrams/pipeline-overview.html with a new "Fluxos detalhados ponta a ponta" section covering 7 workflows end-to-end (bugfix light/heavy, audit light/heavy, UX sim light/heavy, plan, brainstorm, hotfix, review-only) with 12 inline SVG step diagrams (agents + gates color-coded) and a full Thariq-style interactive layer (sticky TOC pills, light/heavy filter pills, per-flow review checkboxes with localStorage persistence, per-flow Copy summary buttons, collapsible exemplo cards, response form with 11-option radio + notes + Save/Copy/Clear actions, 7/7 review counter). ZERO changes to agents/, skills/, references/, commands/, hooks/, lib/ or tests/ — pure documentation enrichment. Iron Law preserved: 22-row Mandatory Gates table and 27-row Registry untouched. v7.1.0 (2026-05-19) — MINOR. Telemetry hygiene: new lib/gate-decision-writer.cjs SSOT writer with the canonical 8-value decision vocabulary (BLOCKED, DISPATCHED, SKIPPED, APPROVED, CONFIRMED, REJECTED, TRIGGERED, NOT_TRIGGERED) — runtime throws TypeError on unknown values (defense-in-depth paired with diff-discipline-reviewer's new SSOT-bypass check). Every event auto-carries run_id/plugin_version/schema_version/type/complexity correlation envelope so cross-run analytics no longer require folder-path joins. New .claude/hooks/stop-hook.cjs (registered in .claude/settings.json) calls lib/run-log.cjs::appendRunLog on every Claude Code session end including crashes — closes the 1-line-per-20-runs aggregate bug (Finding #6). lib/fidelity-reporter.cjs VALID_HARDNESS gains AUDIT (was missing since v6.2.0); VALID_DECISION widened to all 8 canonical values; validate*() now pushes a warning to fidelity-report's warnings[] when an invalid value is encountered (was silently nullified). 7 regression tests in tests/regression/v7.1.0/ (F1-F7). 4 agent prose files updated to reference the canonical vocabulary. Backward compat: historical events still tolerated as '(invalid)' (no migration); 22-row Mandatory Gates table and 27-row Registry untouched. Deferred to v7.2.0: gate rename (CHECKPOINT_FAIL/PLAN_REJECTED for clarity) and timestamp format normalization. v7.0.0 (2026-05-19) — MAJOR (license-only). Licensed under PolyForm Shield 1.0.0 (source-available, noncompete clause). All v7.0.0 code is identical to v6.3.0; the major bump signals license-only change per SemVer convention. See LICENSE and NOTICE.md. v6.3.0 (2026-05-19) — MINOR. Implementation Discipline Layer: new SSOT `references/implementation-discipline.md` (scope control, minimal diff, SOLID/KISS/DRY/YAGNI, dependency/config/contract/migration restrictions, test integrity, evidence requirements, severity PASS/NEEDS_REDUCTION/REJECTED). plan-architect emits `CHANGE_CONTRACT` inline in IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN (allowed_files, allowed_new_files, forbidden_files, forbidden_change_types, diff_budget, escalation_required_if, bootstrap). executor-implementer-task gains SCOPE LOCK CHECK section that fires before every Write/Edit (Read remains free; on violation returns status=QUESTIONS with question.context=scope_lock_violation). New agent `agents/quality/diff-discipline-reviewer.md` (tools=Read,Grep,Glob only; static-only inspection; verdict PASS/NEEDS_REDUCTION/REJECTED; max_fix_attempts=5 independent from ADVERSARIAL_BLOCK max=3). review-orchestrator wires diff-discipline as third parallel reviewer alongside adversarial-batch + architecture-reviewer with dual fix_loop_counters. architecture-reviewer adds 5 new checks (abstraction without second use case, new file where local change suffices, unnecessary architecture layer, unrelated refactor, public contract drift) plus 2 reused existing checks (duplicated helper/type/constant, semantic duplication). 7 regression tests in tests/regression/v6.3.0/ (F8-F14). 22-row Mandatory Gates by Complexity invariant preserved (NO new gate added to that table; F1 untouched); Registry stays at 27 rows (F14 defense-in-depth confirms). Bootstrap exception: this release itself created the very enforcement machinery — T1-T3 of v6.3.0 ran without SCOPE LOCK CHECK enforcement (mechanism being born); from T4 onward in this release and all subsequent plans, enforcement is active. Bootstrap flag is one-time-only and locks itself in v6.4.0+. v6.2.0 (2026-05-18) — MINOR. Pre-execution clarification overhaul: replaces fixed 7-question brainstorm template with a 4-phase dynamic agent (Phase A reads project context + likely-affected files BEFORE any question; Phase B inventories gaps across 11 lenses + domain extensions for auth/payment/PII/migration/concurrency; Phase C asks one GATE_REQUEST per real gap with mandatory file:line evidence in option descriptions; Phase D records 02-explore.md + emits structured JSONL telemetry). Adds new step-01b-alternatives agent (proposes 2-4 alternative approaches across Minimal/Pattern-aligned/Aggressive/Contrarian axes after clarification, auto-skips for mechanical tasks). Drift fix on references/complexity-matrix.md: 'Has spec' column for MEDIA changed from 'Optional' to 'Required (auto-dispatch)', matching pipeline-controller.md:281 runtime behavior. Adds 5 new gates (CLARIFICATION_GAPS_DETECTED, CLARIFICATION_RESOLVED, CLARIFICATION_SKIPPED, ALTERNATIVES_PROPOSED, ALTERNATIVE_CHOSEN) plus new AUDIT hardness level (informational telemetry, never blocks, excluded from fidelity scoring). Gate registry 22 → 27. Brainstorm controller step table grows 9 → 10. Dogfood evidence preserved in docs/audits/2026-05-18-clarification-overhaul-dogfood/ (real MEDIA scenario against IFRS 16 contracts.py:232 list_contracts; 14 telemetry events; 4 anti-invention blockers surfaced — streaming/PII/cap/timeout — that the legacy 7-Q template would have left for downstream invention). Backward compat preserved (legacy pipeline-runs/ resume cleanly via missing-field handling on notes.options.alternatives_done). v6.1.0 (2026-05-15) — MINOR. ATDD/BDD/DDD workflow contracts: D5 ATDD non-spec Given/When/Then in quality-gate-router Step 1b, D6 BDD Gherkin per slice in feature-vertical-slice-planner Step 3b, D7 DDD lightweight Bounded Contexts in plan-architect with SOFT BOUNDED_CONTEXT_MISSING event. v6.0.0 (2026-05-15) — MAJOR RELEASE. Comprehensive audit + hardening: 12/12 CRITICAL findings resolved, 22/22 registry gates exercised in runtime, 16 subagents declare Achado #7 protocol explicitly, 3 new security mitigations (HMAC sentinel-state signature, JSONL sanitization parser, pipeline.local.md sandbox parser), 39 regression tests, audit reports archived in docs/audits/2026-05-15-ifrs16-deep-audit/. Effective audit coverage 30% → 95%. Visual documentation overhaul: HTML/SVG flowcharts in docs/diagrams/. Breaking changes: STALE_THRESHOLD_MS constants renamed to canonical STALE_SPAWN_THRESHOLD_MS / STALE_HEARTBEAT_THRESHOLD_MS (aliases preserved until v6.1.0). Migration: hooks consumers should switch to new names; no behavioral change. v5.2.0 (2026-05-08, promoted from v5.2.0-rc.2 with same content; user authorized direct promotion for distribution to all marketplace consumers). v5.2.0-rc.2 (2026-05-08) — Achado #7 protocol adoption expanded to 5 SKILLs (audit/bugfix/feature/spec/pipeline) + brainstorm-controller step agents (step-00-intake, step-01-explore via DISPATCH_REQUEST) + 9 pipeline-controller dispatch sites (Phase 0a/0b/0c, 1.5, 2c/2e, 3a/3b/3c + sentinel) with concrete YAML examples. Closes 3 protocol-coverage lacunas surfaced post-rc.1 adversarial verification. +4 contract regression tests; suite 294 PASS / 10 FAIL (pre-existing Windows CRLF) / 1 SKIPPED. Zero regressions. v5.2.0-rc.1 (2026-05-07) — Achados 1-7 reconciliation + GATE_REQUEST/DISPATCH_REQUEST protocol. Closes 7 contract drift findings from a v5.1.0 dogfood adversarial review. Achados 1-6 are documentation reconciliation (Phase 1.5 plan-mode trigger across 5 surfaces, brainstorm flag propagation, STEP 1.7 classification guard, type=Spec coverage). Achado 7 is architectural: empirical probe confirmed Claude Code harness strips AskUserQuestion/Agent/EnterPlanMode from subagent tool manifests at runtime, regardless of frontmatter; mitigation via emit-and-hoist protocol (3 new block schemas in references/gate-request-protocol.md), adopted in pipeline-controller, brainstorm-controller, executor-controller. Protocol entries live in protocol-events.jsonl (separate from gate-decisions.jsonl) to avoid final-validator's strict 22-gate-registry validation; named gates dual-write for cross-traceability. +13 contract regression tests (suite stays GREEN, zero regressions). 5 follow-ups deferred to v5.2 final: state persistence, lock cleanup, runtime tests, dispatch_id retry, exec-window protocol migration. v5.0.0 — first major release, promoted from v5.0.0-rc.1 with same content. All 7 v5.0 DoD criteria DONE; see CHANGELOG.md [5.0.0] for the promotion summary and [4.17.0] for the technical Wave 8-spec content. v4.17.0 (Wave 8-spec — TRACE.md schema + writer + standalone validator + plan-mode auto-trigger + --no-plan bypass): closes 3 v5.0 DoD criteria in one wave (#2 TRACE.md by default, #3 attachable to PR, #6 plan-mode-enforcer auto-triggers on MEDIA/COMPLEXA). Adds `references/trace-schema/v1.md` (schema_version=1, canonical field order, 1 happy-path + 1 corrupt fixture), `scripts/validate-trace.cjs` (pure-Node validator, exit 0/1 with stderr diff), `tests/integration/trace-writer.test.js` (7 contract tests), `tests/unit/validate-trace.test.js` (5 tests), `tests/unit/plan-mode-trigger.test.js` (5 tests covering MEDIA/COMPLEXA × with/without `--no-plan`). Modifies `agents/core/pipeline-controller.md` Phase 3 closure with new Step 3b-post (TRACE.md emitter wired between final-validator and finishing-branch; opens edit-guard exec-window for cross-tree write to `.pipeline-orchestrator/runs/<run-id>/`); modifies `commands/pipeline.md` Phase 1.5 trigger from `complexity == COMPLEXA` to `complexity ∈ {MEDIA, COMPLEXA} AND --no-plan ausente` plus new `--no-plan` row in modes table; adds asymmetric override semantics (MEDIA + --no-plan = skip+log; COMPLEXA + --no-plan = plan runs anyway, override logged). Corrects `designs/pipeline-orchestrator-v5-consolidated.md` §8 prose to remove ambiguity flagged in `docs/v5-readiness-report.md` §1. Iron Law respected: ZERO changes to gate registry (still 22 in `references/gates.md`), sentinel checkpoints, or agent dispatch namespace; default behavior (no `--no-plan`) preserves v4.16.0 EXACTLY for SIMPLES and COMPLEXA; MEDIA gets plan-architect for the FIRST TIME (additive behavior change, documented in CHANGELOG Behavior Changes section). Suite stays GREEN: 149+17 NEW unit + 7 NEW integration + 5/1 compat + hooks syntax. Wave 8-spec self-hosted dogfood revealed sentinel-hook cwd-discovery brittleness (logged as v5.0-rc.1 follow-up). v4.16.0 (Wave 8-pre / Issue #11 — Real-mode Compat Runner): closes Issue #11 by reimplementing `tests/compat/runner.cjs::executeReal()` from stub to working real-mode CI harness using the `PreToolUse` hook contract that became available in Claude Code v2.1.85+ (`permissionDecision: "allow"` + `updatedInput.answers` to satisfy `AskUserQuestion` in headless mode). Adds `tests/compat/auto-answer-hook.cjs` (generic first-option-default hook with header-keyed overrides via `tests/compat/v4-baseline/answers-overrides.json`), `tests/unit/compat-runner-real.test.js` (8 hook unit tests + 1 conditional real-mode test that skips when claude CLI absent), and splits `.github/workflows/compat-regression.yml` into mock job (always, gate of PR) + real job (opt-in via `vars.CLAUDE_CLI_AVAILABLE=true` + `secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, runs bugfix-fixture smoke on PR or `--all` on `workflow_dispatch`). Updates `designs/slice-0/SPIKE-CI-HARNESS.md` from PARTIAL PASS to PASS. Iron Law respected: ZERO changes to `agents/`, `skills/`, `references/`, `commands/`, `hooks/` (plugin core untouched). Suite stays GREEN: 129 unit + 8 NEW unit + 12 integration + 5 PASS / 1 SKIPPED compat + 8 hooks syntax (exit 0). DoD criterion #5 advances PARTIAL → PARTIAL+. Wave 8 (TRACE.md + plan-mode auto-trigger) remains the next gate to v5.0.0-rc.1. v4.15.0 (Wave 7-spec — v4-to-v5 Migration Doc + v5 Readiness Report): docs-only release that consolidates the v4.0 → v4.14 lineage into `docs/MIGRATION-v4-to-v5.md` (10 sections: lineage table, 13 accumulated breaking changes, FQDN mapping for the v4.9.0 namespace correction, DoD v5.0 status with 3 DONE / 2 PARTIAL / 2 OPEN, compat matrix for FX Studio + Pulsar + custom forks, what v5.0 will/won't change) and adds `docs/v5-readiness-report.md` (1–2-page snapshot at v4.15.0 with the 7-criterion checklist + verification methods + gap analysis + recommended path: Issue #11 → Wave 8 (TRACE.md + plan-mode auto-trigger) → tag v5.0.0-rc.1). Iron Law respected: ZERO changes to agents/, skills/, references/, commands/, hooks/, or tests/. Suite stays GREEN at v4.14.0 levels: 129 unit + 12 integration + 5 PASS / 1 SKIPPED compat + 8 hooks syntax (exit 0). v4.14.0 (Wave 6-spec — Integration Tests + Compat Fixture + Bad-Variant Fixtures): pure additive release that hardens the Wave 1–5 spec lifecycle stack with three layers of net. Adds `tests/integration/spec-workflow-e2e.test.js` (8 new scenarios) covering the spec-format-gate → spec-content-reviewer → spec-post-impl-validator → spec-closer chain, gate hardness/recovery assertions against `references/gates.md` (22-gate registry), `mode_used` mapping in `agents/executor/spec-closer.md` (spec-heavy → full / spec-light → slim / spec-audit-only → audit), and ADVERSARIAL_LOOP_CHECKPOINT counter-reset semantics from v4.13.0 (`shouldEscalate(attempt, batch_changed)` pure function). Adds TEMPLATE compat fixture `tests/compat/v4-baseline/scenarios/spec-fixture/` (input.md + expected.yaml; no mock-output.json) staking out the spec-heavy observable contract for a future dogfooding session — runner.cjs auto-discovers and SKIPs it via the case-insensitive TEMPLATE check. Adds three bad-variant spec fixtures under `tests/fixtures/specs/`: `auth-flow-bad-yaml/` (intentionally unparseable spec.json → SPEC_FORMAT_GATE_FAIL HARD via critical-artifact rule), `auth-flow-no-traceability/` (design.md stripped of Traces-to + Glossary + responsibilities + data model + contracts → ≥8 of 25 checks fail → score ≤17 → NO-GO), `auth-flow-missing-artifact/` (tasks.md absent → SPEC_ARTIFACT_MISSING MANDATORY before format scoring runs). One surgical edit in `tests/unit/compat-baselines.test.js` relaxes a hard-coded SKIPPED regex (0 → 0 or 1) to accommodate the new TEMPLATE fixture, with comment pointing to the future tighten-back trigger. Iron Law respected: ZERO changes to agents/, skills/, references/, commands/, hooks/. Suite: 129 unit + 12 integration (was 4) + 5 PASS / 1 SKIPPED compat, all exit 0. v4.13.0 (Gates Invariants & Mode Persistence — Wave 5-spec): adds 6 spec gates to references/gates.md registry (SSOT sync with pipeline-controller.md Inline Invariants, closing ARCH-1 gap from v4.11.0 adversarial review); extends commands/pipeline.md Inline Invariants from 15 to 21 gate names; adds Spec row to complexity-matrix.md Pipeline Routing Matrix; introduces mode_used field (slim|full|audit) to spec-context-schema.md as spec.json field; wires mode_used write step into spec-closer.md based on pipeline_variant. +16 unit tests (gates registry parsing, escalation rule, variant→mode mapping, regression baseline). v4.12.0 (Wave 4-spec — /spec entry-point + 3 pipeline composition refs): adds the thin manual-only `skills/spec/SKILL.md` entry-point (mirrors skills/bugfix, skills/audit, skills/feature pattern), pre-classifying `task_type=Spec` to skip the type-detection round in task-orchestrator. Variant flags `--light` / `--heavy` / `--audit-only` route directly to skills/spec-light, spec-heavy, or spec-audit-only with their prescriptive 6/9/5-step procedures (Wave 2). Without a flag, dispatches to pipeline-controller, which uses the Wave 3-spec 4-signal classifier to select the right variant. Three new pipeline composition reflexes (`references/pipelines/spec-light.md`, `spec-heavy.md`, `spec-audit-only.md`) document team composition + step-by-step flow with 1:1 fidelity to their SKILL.md sequence_lock — enforced by a new cross-ref test (`tests/unit/spec-entry-point-and-pipelines.test.js`, +8 tests, suite 103→111). Backward compat preserved: `/pipeline-orchestrator:pipeline` full classifier path is unchanged; existing entry-points (bugfix/audit/feature) untouched. Zero changes to agents/, no changes to skills/spec-light, skills/spec-heavy, skills/spec-audit-only, references/gates.md, or commands/pipeline.md (purely additive). v4.11.0 (Wave 3-spec — Spec Classifier Routing): wires type=Spec first-class classification into task-orchestrator (4-signal detection: explicit path / --type=spec flag / prose regex / glob fallback), routes spec-light/spec-heavy/spec-audit-only via pipeline-controller skill dispatch (mirrors bugfix pattern), adds 5 spec sentinel checkpoints (guarded on pipeline_variant.startsWith("spec-")), AC-seeded ATDD in quality-gate-router (1 scenario per AC, EARS preserved + bullet normalized), GO/CONDITIONAL/NO-GO vs PASS/FAIL/SKIPPED vocabulary doc in audit-trail.md. Backward compat preserved (non-spec pipelines route exactly as v4.10.0); zero changes to Wave 1 spec lifecycle agents or Wave 2 spec skill trees. v4.10.0 (Wave 3 — Compat Baselines): graduates all 5 compat fixtures (audit/bugfix/feature/hotfix/ux) from TEMPLATE → REAL baselines captured 2026-05-05 against pipeline v4.10.0. Each fixture now ships paired `expected.yaml` + `mock-output.json` with the 5 observable contract fields (classification, gates_triggered, agents_invoked, artifacts_produced, verdict). Real-mode wiring of the runner remains a Slice 4-extended item: `executeReal` is still a stub due to upstream `--ci-auto-confirm` gap in Claude Code (documented in `designs/slice-0/SPIKE-CI-HARNESS.md`). v4.9.x: spec workflow polish + CI debt. v4.9.0 (Spec Workflow Import — Wave 2): imports 3 prescriptive skill trees. v4.8.0 (Hook Enforcement). v4.7.0 (Slice 3b polish). v4.6.x (Slice 3b feature workflow). v4.5.0 (Slice 3a audit). v4.4.x (Slice 1.5 bugfix import). v4.3.x (skill migration). v4.2.x (SEC patches + thin entry-points). v4 base: orchestration in isolated controller agent.

entry.title: cc-fleet
entry.content: Spawn any third-party LLM provider with an Anthropic-compatible API (e.g. DeepSeek, GLM, Kimi, Qwen, MiniMax) as real Claude Code agent-team teammates or one-shot subagents — driven exactly like native teammates. Your main session's own auth is untouched (OAuth subscription or API key, either works); provider workers bill the provider API key via apiKeyHelper (the key never enters env/argv/history). Requires the `cc-fleet` binary on PATH, installed separately.
